Legitimising implementation - now in html

A while ago I put together a two-page tufte-style handout about the legitimacy framework and nine pragmatic strategies that came out of my PhD thesis. That handout is good for circulating as a printed copy in person, but the online version available here has tended to be a bit awkward to share.

An HTML version

I have since put together an html version, which is now available here.

Written on July 14th, 2026 by James Reynolds
Feel free to share!
